translations.en: a large black woman with a loud laugh.
translations.zh: 體型豐碩、笑聲爽朗的黑人女子。

translations.en: "Hello, hello!" she cries, clapping her hands together.*
translations.zh: 「你好，你好！」她拍著手高聲呼道。*

translations.en: "You're here again! Good." She smiles widely. "What can I get ya?"
translations.zh: 「又來了！好。」她展顏大笑。「要買什麼？」

translations.en: "Amanda, but you can call me 'Miss Mandy'."
translations.zh: 「阿曼達，但你可以叫我『曼迪小姐』。」
「要@麥酒、@蜂蜜酒、@葡萄酒、@口糧還是@行路麵包？」
「我賣@麥酒、@蜂蜜酒、@葡萄酒、@口糧和@行路麵包。」

translations.en: "He's been in here a few times. He has a homesick look, he does."
translations.zh: 「他來過好幾次了。他看起來很想家，是的。」

translations.en: "Remember to tell your friends 'bout Miss Mandy."
translations.zh: 「記得告訴你的朋友有曼迪小姐這個人喔。」

translations.en: "That's one on me. 'Tain't never heard o' that."
"Come back when you have some gold."
"You don't have room to carry it."
"Some say I make the best Waybread in these parts. It costs just 2 gold. You want to try some?"
translations.zh: 「有人說我做的行路麵包是這一帶最好的。只要2枚金幣。要試試嗎？」

translations.en: "Come back when you have some gold."
"You don't have room to carry it."
"That'll put some meat on your bones."
"Rations are 4 gold apiece. How many do you want?"
$N looks at $Y. "You haven't got room to carry any!"
translations.zh: $N望向$Y。「你已經帶不下任何東西了！」

translations.en: "Come back when you have some gold."

translations.note: \s 為複數後綴，保留原文標記（實際不顯示）

translator_notes: 阿曼達是熱情開朗的食物商，自稱「曼迪小姐」（Miss Mandy）。她賣麥酒、蜂蜜酒、葡萄酒、口糧和行路麵包。南方口語Y'all=大家。Waybread→行路麵包，rations→口糧。Mead/Ale/Wine 品名系統字串不翻。
